allow: PowerShell(python -c "import fastapi, uvicorn, motor, dotenv, jwt, bcrypt; print\('all backend deps present'\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(if \(-not $?\) { "SRV lookup failed - cluster probably doesn't exist" })

PowerShell($dataDir = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PropTuristicas-mongo-data"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $dataDir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dataDir | Out-Null }; Write-Output "data dir: $dataDir"; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 27017 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | Format-Table LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess -AutoSize; $conn.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, Path -AutoSize } else { Write-Output "Nothing on port 8000" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Write-Output "Still in use - PIDs:"; $conn.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique } else { Write-Output "Port 8000 free" })

PowerShell(try { Stop-Process -Id 27260 -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Stop-Process executed" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(Get-Process -Id 27260 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "PID 27260 still alive" } else { Write-Output "PID 27260 is gone" })

Bash("e:/Personal Projects/PropiedadesTuristicas-EMERGENTNOW - Copy/.venv313/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import cloudinary; print\('cloudinary', cloudinary.VERSION if hasattr\(cloudinary,'VERSION'\) else 'installed'\)")
